ogTitle: Murrawombie vs Murray Downs: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Murrawombie and Murray Downs.
heading: Murrawombie vs Murray Downs — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Murrawombie, New South Wales and Murray Downs, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Murray Downs has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Murrawombie (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Murrawombie or Murray Downs safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Murrawombie has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Murray Downs scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Murrawombie scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Murray Downs scores 56/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Murrawombie or Murray Downs?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Murray Downs has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.17% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
